title: IntentPayload
description: Self-contained parsed intent carried from the API boundary to the router. Validated at construction; consumers may trust it without re-validating.

intent.description: Unique intent identity used by the router to select a handler (FR-001, FR-002).

confidence.description: Normalized certainty in the identified intent, inclusive 0..1 (FR-003, FR-004).

entities.description: Extracted parameters as a name->value map; may be empty (FR-005).

raw_input.description: Verbatim original input that produced the intent; not re-parsed or sanitized (FR-006).

timestamp.description: Timezone-aware UTC creation time, ISO-8601; auto-defaulted at construction, overridable (FR-007).
